title: Olive Fair in Le Cannet | Mas du Chanoine
description: Olive Fair in Le Cannet: French Riviera event near our guesthouse.
paragraphs: This annual festival of olive brings together farmers and harvesters in Le Cannet. You will find stalls to taste and buy olives, compare varieties, and buy olive oil pressed in the region and culinary specialties (tapenade, anchovy puree, olive pasta…).
